changelog:
## 0.3.16 — 2025-07-14

### Changed
- Consolidated testcase-generation skill: all naming conventions, CSV format rules, and quality standards embedded directly (no external reference files)
- Consolidated testcase-json-converter skill: all GOAT conversion rules, component detection, validation, and gap report format embedded directly
- Updated agent definition: removed dependency on testcase-standards folder, embedded report template
- Removed redundant manual-test-generation skill
- Skills now enforce MANDATORY order: read codebase first (repos.json layer architecture) → then KNOWLEDGE.md + existing TCs + support tickets
- Agent version bumped to 1.1.0

### Removed
- manual-test-generation skill (redundant — covered by testcase-generation)
- agents/testcase-generator/testcase-standards/ folder (content embedded in skills)
